code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn second_int(_ line: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n and is_ws_at(line, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  while i < n and not is_ws_at(line, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  while i < n and is_ws_at(line, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  let start = i
  while i < n and not is_ws_at(line, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start == i
    None
  else
    string.parse_int(string.substring(line, start, i))
  end
end

mut total = 0
mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
      match second_int(line)
      when Some(v)
        total = total + v
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")
